attributes.title: Net Sec Watch - How to Interpret This View
attributes.description: Guidance for distinguishing empty results, delayed ingestion, and query errors.
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Net Sec Watch - How to Interpret This View","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"### Result status

- **No matching events:** the query succeeded. Broaden the time range or remove filters before concluding there was no activity.
- **Delayed ingestion:** run `make ingestion-status`. If a stream is stale, treat results as incomplete and inspect the collector.
- **Query error:** review the error banner, DQL syntax, field names, permissions, and OpenSearch health. Do not interpret an error as zero events."},"aggs":[]}
